inputs.titre: Pillage de Lugdunum par les Germains

reason: The image depicts a scene of a city under attack, with buildings on fire and people fleeing. The clothing appears to be simple tunics and cloaks, consistent with the Roman era. The weapons appear to be axes and possibly spears. The architecture of the buildings appears to be Roman, with terracotta roofs. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms like modern clothing, technology, or fantastical elements. The general atmosphere of chaos and destruction seems appropriate for a city being sacked.
